originalTitle: Oracle’s stock slides after earnings, as the steep price of AI spooks investors
summary: Oracle blew past earnings expectations and grew its contract pipeline to $638 billion, but Wall Street is concerned about its rising AI costs.
content: Oracle blew past earnings expectations and grew its contract pipeline to $638 billion, but Wall Street is concerned about its rising AI costs.
chineseTitle: 由于 AI 的高昂价格吓坏了投资者，甲骨文股价在财报发布后下跌
chineseSummary: 甲骨文超出了盈利预期，并将其合同管道增加至 6380 亿美元，但华尔街对其不断上涨的人工智能成本感到担忧。
chineseContent: 甲骨文超出了盈利预期，并将其合同管道增加至 6380 亿美元，但华尔街对其不断上涨的人工智能成本感到担忧。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
